mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_test_record (user_id, test_id, answers, total_score, result_text) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{testId}, #{answers, typeHandler=com.zoctan.api.core.typehandler.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{totalScore}, #{resultText} )
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, t.title AS testTitle FROM user_test_record r JOIN psychological_test t ON r.test_id = t.id JOIN account a ON r.user_id = a.id WHERE a.name = #{name} AND r.test_id = #{testId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT r.*, t.title AS testTitle FROM user_test_record r JOIN psychological_test t ON r.test_id = t.id JOIN account a ON r.user_id = a.id WHERE a.name = #{name} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM user_test_record WHERE total_score > #{score} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT r.id, r.user_id AS userId, r.test_id AS testId, r.total_score AS totalScore, r.result_text AS resultText, r.created_at AS createdAt, a.name AS username FROM user_test_record r LEFT JOIN account a ON r.user_id = a.id WHERE r.total_score > #{threshold} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
